steps.title: Write s(t) and identify a, b, c
steps.content: $s(t) = r(t) + 1 = -2t^2 + 53t + 1$. So $a = -2$, $b = 53$, $c = 1$. Negative leading coefficient → parabola opens down → vertex is the maximum.

steps.title: Match the answer
steps.content: The maximum of $s$ is $1 + 2\!\left(\dfrac{53}{4}\right)^2$. That matches choice C — C is correct.
